options.label: 😔 Low — a little sad or tired
🤯 Overstimulated — too much going on in my head

gloomy_restless.recommendation: Sounds like you need to exercise. If the climbing gym is too far, go for a walk or do that crazy MadFit core exercise video. 💪

gloomy_low.recommendation: You are my cutie pie. Cutie pies need lots of cuddles and attention. Send me floomps and nibbles and then eat something that will make me jealous. 💛

gloomy_overstimulated.recommendation: No screens or audiobooks for a bit. Lie down, close your eyes, or just sit somewhere quiet. Put on soft ambient music if silence is too loud. You need to let your brain decompress. 🧘 If that doesn't work, write down all of your thoughts and send them to me. 💌

gloomy_other.recommendation: 🍮 Send me a message and we can talk about it when I wake up.
